title: Release notification
description: Announces a freshly cut release to Slack, with a Wishew-style changelog. Secrets come from the environment (SLACK_BOT_TOKEN, SLACK_CHANNEL_ID) — never options, so a token never lands in the project graph. The version, URL and changelog range fall back to RELEASE_VERSION / RELEASE_URL / RELEASE_FROM / RELEASE_TO, which the release job knows.

appName.description: Project name shown in the message, e.g. dev-blog.

version.description: Version without the leading v. Falls back to RELEASE_VERSION. Empty means nothing to announce.

url.description: Link the 'View release' button points at. Falls back to RELEASE_URL.

from.description: Changelog range start (sha or tag). Falls back to RELEASE_FROM.

to.description: Changelog range end (sha or tag). Falls back to RELEASE_TO.

includeMerges.description: Include merge commits in the changelog.

body.description: Pre-rendered markdown notes (e.g. a GitHub Release body). When set, used as the changelog verbatim and the git range is ignored. Falls back to RELEASE_BODY.
